rationale: No qualitative change from Poland's perspective — Iran deal delay continues, Ukraine targeting Russian energy is a continuation, EU migration rules are background noise.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: Conflicting signals persist on Iran deal timing, keeping energy market uncertainty alive. For Poland, gas/oil price stability remains contingent on this outcome.

top_events.title: Ukraine to keep targeting Russian energy after hitting sea terminal
top_events.summary: Ukraine's strikes on Russian energy infrastructure continue as established pattern. Indirect effect on Russian energy export capacity, marginally relevant to European energy markets.

top_events.title: New EU migration rules debated
top_events.summary: EU migration policy reform discussion continues; Poland faces ongoing migration pressure from the east, but no new qualitative policy shift announced.
